meeting.title: Backend sync
meeting.summary: The team agreed to use Neo4j as structured memory and start with transcript ingestion before voice capture.

tasks.title: Create Neo4j schema migration
tasks.description: Add constraints and indexes for users, meetings, tasks, decisions, projects, topics, interests, and task updates.
tasks.sourceText: Pratik will create the Neo4j schema migration.

tasks.title: Draft missed-meeting summary format
tasks.description: Define the first version of the personalized missed-meeting summary.
tasks.sourceText: Maybe Asha can draft what missed summaries should look like.

decisions.title: Use Neo4j for structured memory
decisions.description: Raw transcripts stay outside Neo4j; Neo4j stores durable meeting meaning.
decisions.rationale: Graph relationships make user, team, task, decision, and meeting queries direct.
decisions.sourceText: Neo4j should store structured memory, not raw logs.

risks.title: Voice capture may delay MVP
risks.description: Discord voice capture and transcription can be more complex than text ingestion.
risks.sourceText: We should start with text transcripts before tackling voice capture.
